title: Wearwise
description: A digital weather wardrobe assistant where the mood of the day adapts to the background. Suggest outfit based on weather prediction

media.alt: Wearwise - A digital weather wardrobe assistant

title: Silentwatch - Noisemeter
description: A noise meter that helps people understand the sound levels around them in real time and breaks it down in a simple, visual way.

media.alt: a noise meter that helps people understand the sound levels around them in real time and breaks it down in a simple, visual way.

title: AI plant doctor
description: A calm and intuitive flow that helps users identify plant diseases in seconds.

title: Chargeloop
description: An electric vehicle charging finder. A tool designed to reduce range anxiety by showing real-time availability, charging speed, pricing, and progress in a clear, calm way.

title: Loan eligibility check
description: A transparent and guided experience for loan applicants

title: Loan confirmation flow
description: A transparent and guided experience for loan applicants

title: PlantPal
description: A minimal plant care reminder app for people who love their greens but forget when to water them.

title: Event booking App
description: An intuitive interface that works for both first-time users looking to buy tickets and event planners searching for reliable vendors.

title: Settings Screen
description: Settings screen with a focus on appearance preferences.
